label: Grounding Check
description: Verify that an LLM-produced claim references only entities that appear in one or more upstream ground-truth sources. Extracts pod-like / component-like tokens from the claim and intersects with tokens present in the truth sources. Deterministic, no LLM round-trip. Use BEFORE notifying downstream consumers (Slack/email) when running against weak models that hallucinate cluster facts.

settings.name: claim
settings.label: Claim text to verify
settings.description: The LLM-generated text (or JSON) whose entity references should be ground-checked. Accepts a string OR an object (JSON.stringify'd before scanning).

settings.name: groundTruth
settings.label: Ground-truth source(s)
settings.description: Concatenated text of every authoritative upstream source. Template-interpolated. Pod names / component names that appear here are 'grounded'; anything else mentioned in the claim is flagged as unfounded.

settings.name: strictMode
settings.label: Strict mode
settings.description: When true, the node FAILS the execution if any unfounded entity is detected (use for safety-critical flows where false claims are worse than no message). When false (default), the node always completes — downstream consumers read `valid` / `unfoundedEntities` and decide how to render.

settings.name: allowedTokens
settings.label: Always-allowed tokens
settings.description: JSON array of additional tokens that are pre-approved (e.g. ['kubelet','etcd','controller-manager']). Skips the ground-truth check for these.

ai.shortDescription: Fact-check an LLM claim against upstream ground truth (deterministic, no second LLM call).
ai.whenToUse: Wire BEFORE any notify_* node when running watchdog/triage flows on weak models. Catches the 'model invents a Redis crash that didn't happen' failure mode.
ai.examplePrompt: Verify the synthesis output only references pods that appear in the cluster health snapshot.
ai.promptHints: Pass the structured synthesis text as `claim` and the concatenated upstream MCP outputs as `groundTruth`. Read `result.valid` + `result.unfoundedEntities` downstream.

outputAssertions.name: result_present
outputAssertions.errorMessage: grounding_check did not produce a valid result envelope.
